name: cav-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for CAV, the International Conference on Computer Aided Verification: routing formal-methods work among CAV, TACAS, FMCAD, VMCAI, POPL/PLDI, and journals; the four submission categories (Regular, Short Tool, Short Application, Industrial Experience & Case Studies) in Springer LNCS; the two-stage review with early reject and rebuttal; partial double-anonymity; the AEC artifact evaluation (Available / Functional / Reusable badges); verification-tool reproducibility on SV-COMP/SMT-COMP benchmarks with seeds, resource limits, and proof witnesses; and the LNCS open-access camera-ready. Grounded in the CAV 2026 (FLoC, Lisbon) call, Springer LNCS proceedings, i-cav.org, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
